	include \
	include/xlocale \

# Autogenerated - do NOT edit!

DIRDEPS = \
	include \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \


.include <dirdeps.mk>

.if ${DEP_RELDIR} == ${_DEP_RELDIR}

.endif
>>>
